lines.text: All right. [pause] Let's poll it. I want a go or a no-go for the burn.
[deliberate] Harmony One, you are go for trans-lunar injection.
(low) [quietly] Burn nominal. Coast, sixty-two hours. No abort from here.
Trajectory's good, flight. She's away and clear.
[tired] Sixty-two hours to lunar orbit, gentlemen. Get some sleep.
[warmly] We've had the mic the whole trip, you know. You don't have to keep tapping at me, Cricket.
Yeah. [chuckles] Old habit. Fifty years of it, it's hard to shake.
[quietly] Can I ask you something about Sky King.
[hesitates] Did he ever get to fly it again?
[warmly] He flew it. The rest of his life.
